message:
feat(tests): add E2E tests for global flags (beads_rust-pnvt)

Add comprehensive E2E tests for CLI global flags:
- --json flag: list, show, ready, blocked, stats
- --no-color flag and NO_COLOR env var
- --no-db flag: list, show, ready operations
- --allow-stale, --no-auto-flush, --no-auto-import flags
- --lock-timeout flag
- --quiet and --verbose (-v, -vv) flags
- Combined flag tests and flag position tests

All 133 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
